narrative.description: A concise, owner-facing paragraph on the firm's cash position: total outstanding and its aging, billed vs collected for the period, stale unbilled work, and what the collections engine did. Reference only figures present in the supplied data; never invent numbers.

topRisks.description: Up to three ranked top-debtor risks, most concerning first.

customerName.description: The debtor's name, taken verbatim from the supplied data.

why.description: Why this debtor is a risk, grounded in the supplied signals and figures.

suggestedAction.description: One concrete next action for the firm. Do not promise anything on the firm's behalf.
